purpose: Record strict no-promotion decisions for the 21 local-scaffold-only Sequencing.com marketplace packages that still lack source-backed sample report rows, formal field maps, and row-level citation bindings.
promotionStandard: Do not mark sampleReport, formalFields, or citationBindings ready from synthetic fixture rows.
Do not count marketing copy, product order pages, public education pages, or logged-in detail metadata as sample report rows.
Direct authenticated detail data without a non-empty reportFile or visible generated output rows is detail evidence only.
Sibling sample rows may support output-structure constraints only when explicitly marked as sibling evidence; they do not promote the target package to report-specific sample-backed formal readiness.
External product samples, including third-party Promethease examples, are reference context unless captured as official Sequencing.com marketplace output for the exact package.

generalSources.use: Proves 164 visible authenticated marketplace card positions.
Proves 164 structured marketplace page-props items and 87 unique hrefs.
Confirms bundle/product positioning only; not sample report output.
General context that marketplace reports can generate patient or clinician reports; not package-specific evidence for these 22.
General context that generated results live in Sequencing.com accounts; not package-specific sample rows, schemas, or output fields for these 22.
General context about app/report processing behavior; not package-specific formal output evidence for these 22.

decisions.title: Comprehensive Health Screen WGS Bundle
decisions.routeBehavior: Exact marketplace detail route was not available in the logged-in browser.
decisions.reason: Authenticated card and order-page metadata identify the bundle, but no marketplace detail route, reportFile, mock report, or generated output rows were captured.
requiredEvidenceForPromotion: Official Sequencing.com sample or completed bundle report output
Package-specific formal rows or lab/report fields
Row-level source bindings for the output rows

decisions.title: Connective Tissue Disorders and EDS
decisions.routeBehavior: Exact logged-in detail route resolved and exposed pageProps.reportData.
decisions.reason: The exact detail capture has marketplace metadata but no sample report file or generated output rows. Nearby musculoskeletal or disease-risk rows are not EDS/connective-tissue formal output.
requiredEvidenceForPromotion: Direct connective-tissue or EDS sample row/body from Sequencing.com
Verified completed report artifact for the exact package
Row-level source bindings for connective-tissue or EDS rows

decisions.title: Convert rsids to Coordinates

requiredEvidenceForPromotion: Official output table or report export for the converter
Exact sample rows showing rsID-to-coordinate conversion behavior
Row-level source bindings for each formal output row
